name: Neuralink
notes: Highly competitive. Lead with PyTorch + signal processing.

name: Synchron
notes: Endovascular BCI — less invasive than Neuralink. Highlight any biomedical signal processing work.

name: Paradromics
notes: High-bandwidth BCI. Strong focus on neural data processing pipelines.

name: Blackrock Neurotech
rolesHiredBs: research intern,software engineering intern,neural signal processing intern
notes: Industry standard Utah array. Long history in BCI research. Emphasize electrophysiology and real-time signal processing.

name: Precision Neuroscience
notes: Layer 7 cortical electrode array. Founded by Neuralink co-founder. Focus on high-density surface recordings.

name: Motif Neurotech
notes: Minimally invasive neuromodulation. Smaller team, may have rolling openings.

name: Inbrain Neuroelectronics
notes: Graphene-based neural interfaces. Barcelona HQ, some US positions. Highlight materials science or bioelectronics interest.

name: Kernel
notes: Non-invasive neuroimaging (Flow headset). Emphasis on fNIRS and time-domain optical data.

name: Meta Reality Labs
rolesHiredBs: research scientist intern,ML intern,brain-computer interface intern
notes: Neural interfaces team within Reality Labs. Large-scale recruitment. Highlight any AR/VR or EMG/EEG decoding work.

name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
rolesHiredBs: data science intern,ML intern,computational biology intern
notes: AI-driven drug discovery. Heavy use of computer vision on cell imaging. Emphasize ML + biology intersection.

name: Insitro
rolesHiredBs: ML intern,computational biology intern,data engineering intern
notes: ML for drug discovery. Founded by Daphne Koller. Strong ML culture. Highlight statistical modeling and large-scale data experience.

name: Genentech
rolesHiredBs: bioinformatics intern,computational biology intern,data science intern
notes: Large biotech with strong computational research arm. Formal internship program with structured mentorship.

name: Allen Institute for Brain Science
rolesHiredBs: summer research intern,computational neuroscience intern,data engineering intern
notes: Open-science focus. Massive public datasets (Allen Brain Atlas). Strong fit for computational neuro background. Highlight data analysis and visualization skills.

name: Janelia Research Campus / HHMI
notes: Elite neuroscience research campus. Competitive undergrad program. Emphasize specific research interest alignment with a lab.

name: JHU Applied Physics Lab
rolesHiredBs: research intern,neuroscience intern,ML intern,systems engineering intern
notes: Defense/national security R&D. Neuroscience + AI group does BCI and human-machine teaming work. May require US citizenship. Highlight signal processing and systems thinking.
